About us

Indriya X is a dedicated research and learning platform for Optometrists and Optometry students who are passionate about gaining in-depth knowledge, clinical excellence, and innovation in eye care. 👁️ What you’ll gain: • Evidence-based clinical discussions • Research guidance & paper reviews • Latest advancements in optometry & vision science • Webinars, workshops & expert talks • Case discussions & practical insights • Career guidance, academics & skill development 🎓 Who can join? • Optometry students • Practicing optometrists • Researchers & academicians • Anyone keen to explore new ideas, research & clinical growth 🤝 Our mission: To connect, educate, and empower the optometry community through continuous learning and research-driven practice. 📚 Learn. Research. Innovate. Grow together.

Website

  • INDRIYA X

    300 followers

    • Report this post

    🚀 INDRIYAX INTERNATIONAL WEBINAR 👁️🗨️ Advancing Vision Science | Clinical Excellence | Global Learning 🔬 Topic: Oblate-Designed Lenses for Peripherally Displaced Cones in Keratoconus Join us for an insightful session on advanced contact lens design strategies to improve fit, comfort, and visual outcomes in complex keratoconus cases. 🎙️ Speaker: Elizabeth Chetty Senior Lecturer, University of Johannesburg, South Africa IACLE African Ambassador 📅 Date:17th May 2026 ⏰ Time: 7:30 PM (IST) | 4:00 PM (SAST) 💡 What You’ll Learn ✔️ Clinical approach to peripherally displaced cones ✔️ Role of oblate lens designs ✔️ Practical fitting insights & case-based discussion 👉 Register Now: 🔗 https://lnkd.in/g-dwj4Jg 💬 Join Our WhatsApp Community: 🔗 https://lnkd.in/gd6uD2JK 📩 Limited seats | E-certificates provided Optician India INDRIYA X Vidyasagar College Optometry

    6
    Like Comment Share

  • INDRIYA X reposted this

    Sabra Parween
    3d
    • Report this post

    Grateful to receive this Certificate of Appreciation🎉✨ from INDRIYA X for participating in the webinar on “Visual Testing for Concussion and Injury.” The session by Dr. Cathy Stern, OD, FOVDR, FCSO, FNORA Stern was highly insightful and expanded my understanding of vision assessment, concussion-related visual symptoms, and the importance of early visual evaluation in patient care. Continuous learning in eye care and optometry always motivates me to grow professionally and improve patient outcomes. Looking forward to attending more such informative sessions and enhancing my clinical knowledge. #Optometry #EyeCare #VisionScience #ConcussionManagement #VisualTesting #ClinicalLearning #Webinar #ProfessionalDevelopment #INDRIYAX #Optometrist

    15 2 Comments
    Like Comment Share
  • INDRIYA X

    300 followers

    3d
    • Report this post

    IndriyaX proudly marks the successful completion of our International Webinar on Visual Testing for Concussion and Brain Injury. We extend our sincere gratitude to Dr. Cathy Stern, OD, FOVDR, FCSO, FNORA and all attendees for contributing to an enriching academic experience. 📌 Stay tuned for upcoming advanced sessions

    7
    Like Comment Share

  • INDRIYA X reposted this

    Durgesh Panday
    2w
    • Report this post

    Really insightful session this past weekend on 'Dry Eye Meets Contact Lens' organized by INDRIYA X We all know how challenging it can be to prevent contact lens dropouts when dry eye is in the picture. Anitha Arvind Arvind gave a great breakdown on objective clinical assessments, especially focusing on the lid wiper region and diagnostic tests for CLIDE. Definitely taking these diagnostic tips into my clinical practice. Thanks to the organizers for a great learning experience! #ClinicalOptometry #ContactLensFitting #EyeHealth #OptometryStudent

    34 2 Comments
    Like Comment Share
  • INDRIYA X

    300 followers

    2w
    • Report this post

    Successfully completed our insightful webinar on “Dry Eye Meets Contact Lens – How to Fit Successfully Without Dropouts.” 👁️✨ A big thank you to Anitha Arvind for sharing valuable clinical insights and practical strategies to improve patient comfort and reduce contact lens dropouts. Grateful to all participants for your enthusiastic engagement! Stay tuned for more evidence-based learning with IndriyaX 🚀 Optician India INDRIYA X

    17
    Like Comment Share
  • INDRIYA X

    300 followers

    3w
    • Report this post

    We are pleased to formally announce a strategic Media Partnership between IndriyaX – Vision Innovation and Optician India . This collaboration represents a shared commitment to advancing the field of optometry, vision science, and the optical industry through meaningful knowledge exchange and wider professional engagement. By combining innovation-driven initiatives with an established media presence, this partnership aims to: • Strengthen dissemination of evidence-based insights • Enhance visibility of emerging technologies in eye care • Support continuous professional development • Foster collaboration across clinical, academic, and industry sectors Together, we look forward to contributing to the growth and transformation of the eye care ecosystem in India. Stay connected for upcoming expert content, research highlights, and collaborative initiatives Madhur Gupta Anik Dingal Optician India

    18 4 Comments
    Like Comment Share

    300 followers

    3w
    • Report this post

    👁️🗨️ Introducing OptoTalks by IndriyaX 🎙️ Where clinical expertise meets real-world optometry learning 🚀 A unique series designed for optometrists, students & eye care professionals to upgrade skills through: ✔️ Short clinical Reels (30–60 sec) ✔️ 5–10 expert theory points (concise & practical) 💡 Learn faster. Apply better. Grow smarter. 🔍 What you’ll gain: • Clinical tips you can use immediately • Case-based learning • Research-backed insights • Real-world optometry knowledge 🎯 Get Featured! Share your clinical insight and we’ll credit you with: 📌 Name | Designation | Organization | Country 📩 Want to collaborate? Send your reel or response to: indriyax@gmail.com 🌍 Let your knowledge inspire the vision care community : Join - https://lnkd.in/gd6uD2JK 🔥 Follow @indriyax.vision for more clinical content 🔁 Save | Share | Tag your colleagues https://lnkd.in/g2gcEKiz

    👁️ DRY EYE MEETS CONTACT LENS* How to Fit Successfully Without Dropouts Fitting contact lenses in dry eye patients can be frustrating — discomfort, poor wearing time, and high dropout rates. But with the right clinical approach, you can transform patient experience and success rates WHATSAPP COMMUNITY:https://lnkd.in/gd6uD2JK Join this exclusive webinar by IndriyaX* featuring: 👩⚕️ Anitha Arvind (Associate Professor & HOD OPTOMETRY, G D Goenka University) 🔍 *What you’ll learn:* ✔ Tear film optimization before fitting ✔ Best lens materials for dry eye ✔ Practical fitting strategies ✔ How to reduce dropouts ✔ Improving long-term comfort & compliance 📅 Date: 26 April 2026 ⏰ Time: 8:00 PM 🎯 Perfect for Optometrists, Students & Eye Care Professionals 🚀 Don’t miss this opportunity to upgrade your clinical skills! 👉 *Register Now:* https://lnkd.in/gv9crtDi 📢 Limited seats – Secure your spot today!

    15
    Like Comment Share

  • INDRIYA X reposted this

    Debmalya Chakraborty
    1mo
    • Report this post

    I recently attended an insightful webinar hosted by INDRIYA X, titled "From Brain to Binocular Vision: A Neuro-Optometric Approach to Evaluation and Therapy." A huge thank you to Nayan Gupta Ph.D., FAAO, FIACLE for the deep dive into how neurological processes influence binocular vision and the therapeutic strategies used to address these complexities. Continuous learning is essential in the ever-evolving field of eye care, and I’m eager to apply these insights to my clinical practice in the near future

    19 1 Comment
    Like Comment Share

  • INDRIYA X reposted this

    Sadik Mirza
    1mo
    • Report this post

    I’m pleased to share that I have successfully participated in a webinar on “From Brain to Binocular Vision: A Neuro-Optometric Approach to Evaluation and Therapy.” This insightful session, organized by Indriyax and delivered by Dr. Nayan Gupta, deepened my understanding of the connection between the brain and binocular vision, and its clinical applications in optometry. Grateful for the opportunity to learn from experts and enhance my knowledge in advancing patient care in eye health. Looking forward to applying these concepts in practice and continuing my journey of lifelong learning in optometry. #Optometry #BinocularVision #NeuroOptometry #EyeCare #ContinuousLearning
